CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Patrick Doolittle, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Melissa Baily, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Scott Holley or AOS-Steps of Rome.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 7, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Melissa Baily, and against the Defaulted Defendants Scott Holley and AOS-Steps of Rome, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $40,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,146.44.
Attorney's Fees - $7,243.52.
Costs - $370.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $49,759.96.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2010 Continued To Jul-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
